name: Kahlua Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients; mix well.
2. Press firmly into the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan.
3. Bake at 325 degrees for 5 minutes; cool.
4. Beat the cream cheese with a mixer until fluffy.
5. Add 3/4 cup sugar gradually, mixing well.
6. Add 1/2 cup cocoa.
7. Add eggs one at a time.
8. Stir in the next three ingredients and pour mixture into the pan on top of the crust.
9. Bake at 375 degrees for 25 minutes (will be soft).
10. Combine the sour cream, sugar, and vanilla; spread over the top of the cheesecake.
11. Bake at 425 degrees for 5-7 minutes.
12. Cool to room temperature and chill for 8 hours or overnight.
